title: Intel confirms more layoffs in its data center unit as stock rallies on turnaround momentum
summary: Intel is cutting more jobs in its data center unit as Lip-Bu Tan continues reshaping the company, with the stock up nearly 8 percent two days before earnings. The cuts come two days before Intel reports second-quarter earnings on Thursday.
caption: output/2026-07-21/intel-confirms-more-layoffs-in-its-data-center-unit-as-stock-rallies-o.txt
